function f(f)return o[f-(-807377+861509)]end for f,G in ipairs({{-485119+485120,629164-626373},{-813537-(-813538);841457-840384},{23585-22511,-666306-(-669097)}})do while G[8335+-8334]<G[481457+-481455]do
